description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a dark blue-gray fabric, featuring a chaise lounge on the left side and three main seat cushions. The sofa includes two matching square throw pillows and a large, draped black throw blanket covering the backrest and part of the seat. The armrests are wide, padded, and slightly rounded, providing a comfortable resting area. The backrest is continuous and moderately high, with a straight profile and no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The legs are short, blocky, and minimally visible, likely made of dark wood or plastic. The overall design is plush and inviting, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or outdoor lounge areas in parks or communal spaces.
description: A plush, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark blue-gray fabric with a chaise lounge, two throw pillows, and a draped black blanket. It features wide padded armrests, a straight backrest, and short, blocky legs.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the full L-shape, three seat cushions, chaise lounge, two pillows, and the draped black blanket.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge, the thickness of the armrest, and the pillow placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the draped black blanket, and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the armrest, pillow, and the end of the chaise lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, individual seat cushions and a chaise cushion, all attached and uniform in size; two loose square throw pillows and a draped blanket on the backrest.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, padded armrests at both ends, slightly rounded with a straight profile, matching the sofa's upholstery and height just above the seat level.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of dark wood or plastic, recessed under the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, moderately high backrest with a straight, unsegmented profile and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark blue-gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle seam lines; no visible decorative stitching or patterned texture.
